description: Total population within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total population raster

description: Total female population within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum across all female age-band rasters

description: Total male population within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum across all male age-band rasters

description: Population aged under 5 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total age bands 00 and 01

description: Population aged 0-14 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total age bands 00, 01, 05, and 10

description: Population aged 15-24 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total age bands 15 and 20

description: Population aged 15-64 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total 5-year age bands from 15 to 60

description: Population aged 65 years and older within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of total 5-year age bands from 65 to 90

description: Female population aged 15-49 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of female 5-year age bands from 15 to 45

description: Female population aged 65 years and older within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of female 5-year age bands from 65 to 90

description: Male population aged 65 years and older within the administrative region
aggregation_method: Zonal sum of male 5-year age bands from 65 to 90

description: Female share of total population within the administrative region
aggregation_method: pop_female divided by pop_total multiplied by 100

description: Male share of total population within the administrative region
aggregation_method: pop_male divided by pop_total multiplied by 100

description: Share of total population aged under 5 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: pop_under_5 divided by pop_total multiplied by 100

description: Share of total population aged 0-14 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: pop_children_0_14 divided by pop_total multiplied by 100

description: Share of total population aged 15-24 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: pop_youth_15_24 divided by pop_total multiplied by 100

description: Share of total population aged 15-64 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: pop_working_age_15_64 divided by pop_total multiplied by 100

description: Share of total population aged 65 years and older within the administrative region
aggregation_method: pop_older_65_plus divided by pop_total multiplied by 100

description: Share of total population made up of females aged 15-49 years within the administrative region
aggregation_method: pop_female_15_49 divided by pop_total multiplied by 100

description: Age dependency ratio within the administrative region
aggregation_method: pop_children_0_14 plus pop_older_65_plus, divided by pop_working_age_15_64, multiplied by 100
